demos/modulo1-introduccion/demo-monolito.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
demos/modulo1-introduccion/demo-monolito.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 17.

demos/modulo1-introduccion/demo-monolito.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot.
Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag for Java 21.
demos/modulo1-introduccion/demo-monolito.why_exists: Using source/target instead of release may lead to mismatched class file versions or missing language features in JDK 21.
